markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Q4 performance, new content, and 2026 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Record Impressions:** The blog hit a record 11k+ weekly impressions in late December, validating the content strategy. The next focus is converting this reach into consistent clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [**New Service Launch:** Understory is launching "Thought Leadership as a Service" (TLaaS) to diversify beyond paid media and GTM engineering. A dedicated landing page is the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [**AI Search Dominance:** The primary goal is to rank above competitors (e.g., Directive, Single Grain) in AI Overviews (AEO) for high-value terms like "best GTM agency."](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** The strategy will evolve from building authority via high-volume keywords to creating a cohesive, interlinked content experience to improve user engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

## Topics

### Q4 Performance & Content Audit

  - [**Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [12 articles published before the new year.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Podcast articles updated with high-res images for a uniform blog landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
      - [Record 11k+ weekly impressions achieved in late December.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [**Audit & Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [A 3-month performance report is in progress to analyze click-through rates and inform future optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [The strategy will shift from authority-building to creating a cohesive, interlinked content experience.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [A blog category dropdown (Figma complete) will launch by early next week to improve navigation.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

### New Content & Distribution

  - [**Video Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
      - [Alex recorded new videos over the holidays:](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
          - [Testimonial videos (3 recorded, 2 more planned).](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
          - [A "What is Understory" promo video (VSL).](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [**Action:** Alex to share video links for repurposing (e.g., refreshing the "What is Understory" blog post).](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [**Reddit Experiment:**](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [GrowthX will claim the r/understory subreddit.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [**Plan:** Repurpose 1–2 blog articles weekly on the main page.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [**Rationale:** An experimental, low-effort test for traffic without community moderation overhead.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [**Visuals:**](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
      - [**Blog:** GrowthX design team will create more varied header images to avoid repetition.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
      - [**YouTube:** A new video editor is producing high-quality, viral-style thumbnails.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)

### 2026 Goals & AEO Strategy

  - [**2026 Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [**Revenue:** Triple revenue, a goal Alex is sharing widely for accountability.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [**New Service:** Launch "Thought Leadership as a Service" (TLaaS).](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
          - [**Offer:** LinkedIn content, video editing, graphics.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Diversify beyond paid media and GTM engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
          - [**Priority:** Build a dedicated landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [**AEO (AI Overviews) Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [**Goal:** Rank above competitors (Directive, Single Grain, The Kiln) for terms like "best GTM agency" in AI search summaries.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [**Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
          - [Optimize content for snippets (LLMs pull chunks, not just keywords).](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
          - [Build authority via backlinking.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
          - [Create more comparison articles, which perform well and directly feed LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will add AEO tracking to the dashboard and provide specific recommendations in the performance report.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Alex:** Share links to new video content (testimonials, VSL).](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [Claim the r/understory subreddit.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [Launch the blog category dropdown (by early next week).](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [Deliver the 3-month performance report with AEO recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Provide backlinking strategy and pricing information.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [**All:** Reschedule the next meeting (Jan 22) 30 minutes later to accommodate a conflict.](https://fathom.video/share/mm8q5tKzdiYHUVpT-7zN388DWokyDfym?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
